recipe.title: Fri Apr 17 — Taco Pie
ingredients: 2 cans (8 oz each) refrigerated crescent rolls
steps: Unroll both cans of crescent dough and press into a large 9×13 baking pan, pinching the perforated seams together.
Sprinkle 1 cup cheddar over the crust. Bake until golden and cheese is melted, 12–13 min. Remove and cool slightly.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic, onion, chili powder, cumin, and coriander. Cook until very fragrant, 2–3 min. Add beef, raise heat to medium-high. Cook, breaking up meat, until browned and cooked through, ~5 min. Remove from heat, stir in sour cream, remaining cheddar, and hot sauce.
Place crust on a cutting board. Spoon meat mixture over the crust. Top with romaine, diced tomato, and remaining sour cream. Slice into 6 pieces and serve with hot sauce.
